name: Crockpot Cider Pork Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Cube boneless pork, slice onion and carrot, quarter potato, chop apple.
2. Combine 3 tablespoons flour, salt, thyme, and pepper; toss with meat.
3. Place carrots, potatoes, onion, and apple in the cooker.
4. Top with meat cubes.
5. Pour apple cider and vinegar over meat.
6. Cook on low for 10-12 hours.
7. Turn cooker to high heat.
8. Blend 1/4 cup flour and 1/2 cup cold water until smooth.
9. Stir mixture into the liquid in the crockpot.
10. Cover and cook an additional 15 minutes, or until thickened.
11. Season to taste.
